name: oob_check
description: Query the OOB collaborator for inbound canary hits (out-of-band confirmation of blind SSRF/exfil/exec). Given canary token(s) or URL(s), returns whether the target's server reached the canary, with source IPs and a hit sample. Reads the listener's local port from workers/oob/state.json; never raises (no collaborator -> hit=false).
